description: Configure a new Service Hook in the TailwindTraders project to trigger a compliance scan. Create a Web Hook subscription for the 'Pull request created' event in the 'TailwindTraders' repository (specifically this repository, not 'All'). The hook should target http://localhost:9090/api/compliance-scan using Basic Authentication with username 'compliance_bot' and password 'ScanMyCode2024!'. Note: The target service is offline, so save the subscription even if the connection test fails.
